title: Oseam
main_page_extract:
Oseam (Korean: 오세암) is a 1990 South Korean film directed by Park Chul-soo. It tells the story of two orphans based on a legend in which a five-year-old boy sacrificed himself to open his blinded sister's eyes. The general theme deals with reconciliation between Buddhism and Catholicism.
